evals.prompt: 生成 V26.5.14 的更新日志，日期是今天
evals.expected_output: A markdown file at docs/announcement/V26.5.14.md following the exact format: English metadata blockquote, Chinese bold summary, English italic summary, Chinese sections (新功能/体验优化/问题修复/文档更新), Chinese closing, English sections (New Features/Improvements/Bug Fixes/Documentation), English closing. No emoji, no title, no dividers.

evals.prompt: Draft release notes for version V26.6.0, release date 2026-06-15, since 2026-06-01
evals.expected_output: A markdown file at docs/announcement/V26.6.0.md with commits from 2026-06-01 grouped into user-facing sections. Chinese content first, English content second. Format matches the project convention.

evals.prompt: 帮我写一下新版本的发布公告，版本号 V26.5.15
evals.expected_output: A markdown file following the exact template structure with proper i18n layout. Commits are rewritten as user-facing bullet points without internal implementation details.
